description: Rigorous interval arithmetic certificate issued: Q_Phi < 0 on [0,1] with 52,898 subintervals at 60-digit precision. Algebraic core (log phi_1)'' < 0 proved. Tail bound C=204 established. Strict log-concavity of Phi on [0, infinity) is PROVED. Independent Arb/FLINT verification with 55,892 subintervals at 200-bit precision confirms. All 32 falsification attacks survived.
author: Tristen Kyle Pierson

description: Phase-next bridge research audit gate: Polya Hilfssatz II (REJECTED, circular), Cardon 2002/2005 (REJECTED, preservation only), Csordas-Vishnyakova 2013 Thm 2.3 (PARTIAL MATCH, requires all L_n >= 0). L_2 generalized Laguerre inequality certified via IA (2000 subintervals, lower bound 3.14e-8). 16 H13 counterexample kernels tested, 0 candidates found. Route C identified: Branden-Chasse de Bruijn-Ilieff extension. H13 remains OPEN.
author: Tristen Kyle Pierson
